title: Citation of Part
doc_html:
PART V. RABIES CONTROL

§1269.1. Citation of Part

            The provisions of this Part may be cited as the Rabies Control Law.

            Added by Acts 1954, No. 663, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1275 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
PART V.  RABIES CONTROL
§1269.1.  Citation of Part
The provisions of this Part may be cited as the Rabies Control Law.
Added by Acts 1954, No. 663, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1275 by HCR 84 of
2015 R.S.
